text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Your track was incredible. I was struck by
inspiration the moment I listened to it and was
able to compose the lyrics in a single session."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"I'm going to unveil the full composition at an
upcoming event that you're more than welcome
to attend."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
...Uh huh, I see. So it's a daytime event that
minors can attend. Yes, I've heard of things like
that.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'll be back way before curfew, and the event's
totally legit. Actually, why do I even have to
explain myself to you?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sorry. It's just that you were acting so
suspiciously as you tried to sneak out, I couldn't
help but inquire.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But, hmm... A music event with a live DJ does
sound exciting. Yes, I think I'll come along, as a
learning opportunity!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Man, how did I end up with this bunch of jokers?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wahey-heeey! ☆ I can't believe we're all going to
the same event! ☆

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Shut it. And wait, what are you doing here, Sky?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's a good question. I'm not sure myself,
hehe...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
She's with me! ☆ I was looking for Flower but
spotted Sky, so I grabbed her instead! What a big
W, amirite? ☆

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Hmm?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
This is actually my first time attending an event
like this, but I'm sure it'll be fun.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Who knows. I mean, we won't find out till we get
there.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Woooo! ☆ Omg. That was straight fire! I'm actually gagged at how lit that was!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I never imagined it would be so thrilling. The first
performer's act was filled with so much feeling
and soul.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, you mean the person who just debuted
today? Yeah, the music wasn't my usual style, but
that one song sure hit different.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Which one?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Um, I think it was the one track that was just
released. Those lyrics slapped!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
The music and lyrics were giving big sad, but it
ended up being SO hype. Talk about eating and
leaving no crumbs! ☆

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I remember that one. I think the backing was a
live orchestra recording. It made the song feel
luxurious and classy.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It felt so intimate listening to it. What did you
make of it, Sky?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Umm... To be honest, I'm not a big fan of noisy
crowds.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But I had a good time today. Music where the
artist bares their whole soul to the audience is
actually pretty nice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"You made me the perfect backing track for me
to vent all my despair."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"I'm just getting started. That's why I'm going to
let it all out today and share my feelings with
everyone here."

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(It wasn't until she sang that song live to the
audience that I felt like it was truly complete. But
why? It's illogical for me to feel that way.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
("Just getting started"... Yeah. We've both found
the answer we were after. Now it's a matter of
proving it's the right one.)

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wait, vibe check. It's legit rare for all of us to be
together, right? Why don't we go somewhere
after this to keep the party train going?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: As long as we don't go to a ramen joint.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hm! Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
How about that new foodie theme park that
opened? Apparently, they have an eating
challenge where you try to eat till you literally
burst!

text_block_list.name: Shakur & Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm not quite sure about that...
Yeah, no.
